content.Affiliate_Cosmetic_Message_Descr.en-GB: {{community_name}} is hosting a {{availability_name}} for the coveted **{{reward_names_inline_list}}**! You can view more [details]({{campaign_details_url}}) by [joining]({{campaign_resource_url}}) their community.
content.Affiliate_Cosmetic_Message_Descr.es-ES: ¡{{community_name}} está organizando un {{availability_name}} en el que podrás conseguir **{[reward_items]}**! Podrás obtener más información al [unirte]({{campaign_resource_url}}) a su comunidad.
content.Affiliate_Cosmetic_Message_Descr.fr: {{community_name}} organise un(e) {{availability_name}} pour obtenir les très convoités **{[reward_items]}** ! Vous pouvez consulter plus de détails en [rejoignant]({{campaign_resource_url}}) leur communauté.
content.Affiliate_Cosmetic_Message_Descr.hu: A {{community_name}} egy {{availability_name}}-t szervez a következő jutalmakért **{[reward_items]}**! Több részletről olvashatsz, ha [csatlakozol]({{campaign_resource_url}}) a közösséghez.
content.Affiliate_Cosmetic_Message_Descr.ko: {{community_name}}이(가) **{[reward_items]}**에 대한 {{availability_name}}을(를) 주최하고 있습니다! 더 많은 세부 사항은 해당 커뮤니티에 [참가]({{campaign_resource_url}})하여 확인할 수 있습니다.
content.Affiliate_Cosmetic_Message_Descr.pt-BR: {{community_name}} está organizando um {{availability_name}}, se liga pra ganhar **{[reward_items]}**! Você pode ver mais detalhes [entrando]({{campaign_resource_url}}) na comunidade.

content.Boost_Event_Message_Description.en-GB: Assemble your crew and get ready to set sail- {{campaign_name}} is now live! You'll gain boosted reputation and gold for any activities related to **{{faction_name}}**!
content.Boost_Event_Message_Description.es-ES: ¡Reúne a tu tripulación y prepárate para zarpar: {{campaign_name}} ya está en marcha! ¡Obtendrás un aumento de reputación y oro por cualquier actividad relacionada con **{{faction_name}}**!
content.Boost_Event_Message_Description.fr: Rassemblez votre équipage et préparez-vous à prendre la mer- {{campaign_name}} est désormais lancé ! Vous bénéficierez d’un gain accru de réputation et d’or pour toutes les activités liées à **{{faction_name}}** !
content.Boost_Event_Message_Description.hu: Gyűjtsd össze a legénységedet és készülj a vitorlázásra- A {{campaign_name}} már elindult! Megnövelt reputationt és goldot kapsz minden **{{faction_name}}** tevékenységnél!
content.Boost_Event_Message_Description.ko: 크루를 모아 출항 준비를 하세요 - {{campaign_name}}이(가) 시작되었습니다! **{{faction_name}}**에 관련된 모든 활동에서 평판 및 골드가 증가합니다!
content.Boost_Event_Message_Description.pt-BR: Junte-se à sua tripulação e se preparem pra zarpar, o {{campaign_name}} está ativo! Você vai ganhar reputação e ouro extra por qualquer atividade relacionada a **{{faction_name}}**!

content.Capture_A_Code_Message_Descripti.en-GB: Deckhand Lootin' Lizalaroo is back with another Capture a Code competition on the forums! Snap a shot of **'{{theme_name}}'** and you'll have a chance to earn a variety of exclusive cosmetics.
content.Capture_A_Code_Message_Descripti.es-ES: ¡Lootin' Lizalaroo regresa con otro Capture a Code a los foros! Haz una captura siguiendo la temática **'{{theme_name}}'** y tendrás la oportunidad de ganar una variedad de cosméticos exclusivos en el juego.
content.Capture_A_Code_Message_Descripti.fr: La Moussaillonne Pillarde Lizalaroo est de retour avec un nouveau concours « Capturez un Code » sur les forums ! Prenez un cliché de **« {{theme_name}} »** et vous aurez la chance de gagner une variété de cosmétiques exclusifs.
content.Capture_A_Code_Message_Descripti.hu: Deckhand Lootin' Lizalaroo visszatért egy újabb Capture a Code versennyel a fórumon! Készíts egy képet a **'{{theme_name}}'** témával kapcsolatban és esélyed lesz különféle exkluzív cosmeticokat szerezni.
content.Capture_A_Code_Message_Descripti.ko: 갑판장 Lootin' Lizalaroo가 포럼에서 코드 캡처 대회를 시작했습니다! **'{{theme_name}}'**테마의 스크린샷을 제출하여 독점 스킨을 받을 기회를 잡아보세요!
content.Capture_A_Code_Message_Descripti.pt-BR: O Deckhand Lootin' Lizalaroo está de volta com mais uma competição "Capture a Code" nos fóruns! Tire uma foto de **'{{theme_name}}'** e você terá a chance de ganhar uma variedade de cosméticos exclusivos.

content.Community_Weekend_Game_Event_Mes.en-GB: Raise your tankards and get ready for another community celebration! You can enjoy a boost on gold, reputation, renown, and [more]({{campaign_details_url}})!
content.Community_Weekend_Game_Event_Mes.es-ES: ¡Alzad vuestras jarras y preparaos para otra celebración en comunidad! ¡Podréis disfrutar de un aumento en oro, reputación, renombre y mucho [más]({{campaign_details_url}})!
content.Community_Weekend_Game_Event_Mes.fr: Levez vos chopes et préparez-vous pour une nouvelle célébration communautaire ! Profitez d’un bonus sur l’or, la réputation, la renommée et [plus encore]({{campaign_details_url}}) !
content.Community_Weekend_Game_Event_Mes.hu: Emeljétek fel korsóitokat, és készüljetek fel egy újabb közösségi ünnepre!! Élvezheted a reputation, arany, renown és [egyéb]({{campaign_details_url}}) megnövelését!
content.Community_Weekend_Game_Event_Mes.ko: 탱커드를 들고 커뮤니티 축제를 준비하세요! 골드, 평판, 명성 등 [더 많은]({{campaign_details_url}}) 혜택을 즐기세요!
content.Community_Weekend_Game_Event_Mes.pt-BR: Levantem suas canecas e se preparem pra mais uma celebração da comunidade! Aproveite o boost em ouro, reputação, renome e [mais]({{campaign_details_url}})!

content.Community_Weekend_Game_Event_Rem.en-GB: The current **Community Event campaign** ends <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Make sure to login and complete all [deeds]({{campaign_details_url}}) before <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
content.Community_Weekend_Game_Event_Rem.es-ES: La actual **Campaña de eventos del juego** termina <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Asegúrate de iniciar sesión y completar todas las [hazañas]({{campaign_details_url}}) antes del <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
content.Community_Weekend_Game_Event_Rem.fr: La **campagne d'événement communautaire** en cours se termine <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R> ! Assurez-vous de vous connecter et de compléter toutes les [actions]({{campaign_details_url}}) avant le <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
content.Community_Weekend_Game_Event_Rem.hu: A jelenlegi **Közösségi Esemény kampány** véget ér <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Jelentkezz be és teljesítsd az összes [deed-eket]({{campaign_details_url}}) ezelőtt <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
content.Community_Weekend_Game_Event_Rem.ko: **커뮤니티 이벤트 캠페인**이 <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>에 종료됩니다! <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f> 이전에 로그인하여 [심심풀이]({{campaign_details_url}})를 완료하세요.
content.Community_Weekend_Game_Event_Rem.pt-BR: O **Evento do Jogo** atual termina às <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Certifique-se de logar e completar todas as [façanhas]({{campaign_details_url}}) before <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.

content.Ghoul_And_Glory_Message_Descript.en-GB: Summon your crew and raise the skeletons- a spooky new Ghoul & Glory Weekend has begun! You'll gain boosted reputation, gold, renown, and allegiance for all your dark deeds!

content.Gold_And_Glory_Message_Descripti.en-GB: Call your crew and throw a Voyage on the table- a new Gold & Glory Weekend is now live! You'll gain boosted reputation, gold, renown, and allegiance for all your high-sea hijinks!
content.Gold_And_Glory_Message_Descripti.es-ES: ¡Llama a tu tripulación y lanza una travesía sobre la mesa: ¡El Fin de Semana de Oro y Gloria ya está aquí! Obtendrás un aumento en reputación, oro, renombre y lealtad por todas tus travesuras en alta mar.
content.Gold_And_Glory_Message_Descripti.fr: Appelez votre équipage et lancez une expédition- un nouveau week-end Or et Gloire est désormais en cours ! Vous bénéficierez d’un gain accru de réputation, d’or, de renommée et d’allégeance pour toutes vos aventures en haute mer !
content.Gold_And_Glory_Message_Descripti.hu: Hívd össze a legénységedet és tegyetek egy küldetést a kapitány asztalra- egy újabb Gold & Glory hétvége elindult! Megnövelt reputation-t, aranyat, renown-t és allegiance-t kapsz minden nyílt tengeri bolondságodért!
content.Gold_And_Glory_Message_Descripti.ko: 크루를 불러 항해를 테이블 위에 올려놓으세요. - 새로운 골드 & 글로리 주말이 시작되었습니다! 모든 멀티플레이어 해역에서 골드, 평판, 명성, 충성도가 증가합니다!
content.Gold_And_Glory_Message_Descripti.pt-BR: Junte-se à sua tripulação e votem numa Jornada na mesa: um novo Fim de Semana de Ouro & Glória está rolando! Você ganhará um boost em sua reputação, ouro, renome e lealdade por todas suas façanhas!

content.Gold_Rush_Message_Description.en-GB: Gold Rush is now active until **<t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:t>, <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>**! All loot cashed in will enjoy a 1.5x multiplier on gold for the next hour.
content.Gold_Rush_Message_Description.es-ES: ¡La Fiebre del Oro estará activa hasta las **<t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:t>, <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>**! Todo el botín que entreguéis tendrá un multiplicador de 1.5x, ¡a por el oro!
content.Gold_Rush_Message_Description.fr: La Ruée vers l'Or est maintenant active jusqu'au **<t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:t>, <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>** ! Tous les butins remis bénéficieront d'un multiplicateur de 1,5×- alors emparez-vous de cet or !
content.Gold_Rush_Message_Description.hu: Gold Rush mostantól aktív eddig **<t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:t>, <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>**! Minden beváltott kincsért 1.5-szörös szorzót élvezhetsz - csapj le az aranyra!
content.Gold_Rush_Message_Description.ko: 골드 러시는**<t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:t>, <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>**까지 진행됩니다! 판매한 모든 전리품은 1.5배 보너스가 적용됩니다. - 골드를 모을 절호의 기회를 놓치지 마세요!
content.Gold_Rush_Message_Description.pt-BR: A Febre do Ouro está ativa até **<t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:t>, <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>**! Todo loot vendido receberá um bônus de 1,5x no ouro. Não perde a chance!

content.Insider_Rewards_Reminder_Descrip.en-GB: The current **Insider week** ends <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Make sure to earn enough reputation before <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:F>.
content.Insider_Rewards_Reminder_Descrip.es-ES: La actual **Semana de Insiders** termina el <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Asegúrate de ganar suficiente reputación antes del <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:F>.
content.Insider_Rewards_Reminder_Descrip.fr: La **semaine Insider** en cours se termine <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R> ! Assurez-vous de gagner suffisamment de réputation avant le <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:F>.
content.Insider_Rewards_Reminder_Descrip.hu: A jelenlegi **Insider hét** véget ér <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Győződj meg róla, hogy elég reputationt szerzel ez előtt <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:F>.
content.Insider_Rewards_Reminder_Descrip.pt-BR: A **Semana de Insider** atual termina às <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Certifique-se de ganhar reputação suficiente antes de <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:F>.

content.Miscellaneous_Event_Reminder_Des.en-GB: The current **Game Event campaign** ends <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Make sure to login and complete all [deeds]({campaign_resource_url}}) before <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
content.Miscellaneous_Event_Reminder_Des.es-ES: La actual **Campaña de eventos del juego** termina <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Asegúrate de iniciar sesión y completar todas las [hazañas]({[details_link]}) antes del <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
content.Miscellaneous_Event_Reminder_Des.fr: La **campagne d'événement de jeu** en cours se termine <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R> ! Assurez-vous de vous connecter et de compléter toutes les [actions]({[details_link]}) avant le <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
content.Miscellaneous_Event_Reminder_Des.hu: A jelenlegi **Játék esemény kampány** véget ér <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Jelentkezz be és teljesítsd az összes [deed-eket]({[details_link]}) ezelőtt <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
content.Miscellaneous_Event_Reminder_Des.ko: **게임 이벤트 캠페인**이 <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>에 종료됩니다! <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f> 이전에 로그인하여 [심심풀이]({[details_link]})를 완료하세요.
content.Miscellaneous_Event_Reminder_Des.pt-BR: O **Evento do Jogo** atual termina às <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Certifique-se de logar e completar todas as [façanhas]({[details_link]}) before <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.

content.Regular_Twitch_Drop_Message_Desc.en-GB: Tune in and watch [{{availability_name}}]({{campaign_resource_url}}) for a total of **{{total_rewards_watch_time_text}}** to earn all drops! Remember to link your Twitch account to Sea of Thieves and claim your drop once it's unlocked!
content.Regular_Twitch_Drop_Message_Desc.es-ES: ¡Conéctate y mira [{{availability_name}}]({{campaign_resource_url}}) durante un total de **{{total_rewards_watch_time_text}}** para ganar todas las recompensas! Recuerda vincular tu cuenta de Twitch a Sea of Thieves y reclamar tu recompensa una vez que esté desbloqueada.
content.Regular_Twitch_Drop_Message_Desc.fr: Regardez [{{availability_name}}]({{campaign_resource_url}}) pendant un total de **{{total_rewards_watch_time_text}}** pour obtenir toutes les récompenses ! N’oubliez pas de lier votre compte Twitch à Sea of Thieves et de réclamer votre drop une fois débloqué !
content.Regular_Twitch_Drop_Message_Desc.hu: Kapcsolódj be és nézd a [{{availability_name}}]({{campaign_resource_url}})-t összesen **{{total_rewards_watch_time_text}}**-ig, hogy megszerezd az összes jutalmat! Ne felejtsd el összekapcsolni a Twitch-fiókodat a Sea of ​​Thieves-szel, és váltsd be jutalmad, amint feloldottad!
content.Regular_Twitch_Drop_Message_Desc.ko: [{{availability_name}}]({{campaign_resource_url}})을(를) 시청하고 **{{total_rewards_watch_time_text}}** 동안 추가로 시청하여 모든 드롭스를 획득하세요! 트위치 계정을 씨 오브 시브즈에 연결하여 드롭스가 잠금 해제되면 수령하는 것을 잊지 마세요!
content.Regular_Twitch_Drop_Message_Desc.pt-BR: Clique e assista [{{availability_name}}]({{campaign_resource_url}}) por um total de **{{total_rewards_watch_time_text}}** para ganhar todos os drops! Lembre-se de vincular sua conta da Twitch ao Sea of Thieves para poder resgatar os drops!

content.Special_Twitch_Drop_Message_Desc.en-GB: Tune in and watch [{{availability_name}}]({{campaign_resource_url}}) to earn Twitch Drops! Remember to link your Twitch account to Sea of Thieves and claim your drop once it's unlocked!

content.Twitch_Drop_Reminder_Description.en-GB: The current **{{public_alert_category}}** campaign ends <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Make sure to [claim]({{twitch_drops_inventory_url}) your drops before <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
content.Twitch_Drop_Reminder_Description.es-ES: La actual campaña de **{{public_alert_category}}** termina el <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Asegúrate de [reclamar]({[twitch_inventory_url]}) tus recompensas antes del <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
content.Twitch_Drop_Reminder_Description.fr: La campagne **{{public_alert_category}}** en cours se termine <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R> ! Assurez-vous de [réclamer]({[twitch_inventory_url]}) vos récompenses avant le <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.
content.Twitch_Drop_Reminder_Description.hu: A jelenlegi **{{public_alert_category}}** kampány véget ér <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Ne felejtsd el [beváltani]({[twitch_inventory_url]}) a dropjaidat <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f> előtt.
content.Twitch_Drop_Reminder_Description.ko: **{{public_alert_category}}** 캠페인이 <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>에 종료됩니다! <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f> 이전에 [지금 받기]({{campaign_details_url}})를 클릭하여 수령하세요.
content.Twitch_Drop_Reminder_Description.pt-BR: A campanha de **{{public_alert_category}}** atual termina às <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:R>! Certifique-se de [resgatar]({[twitch_inventory_url]}) seus drops antes de <t:{{end_timestamp_s}}:f>.

globals.Reward_Pages_Footer.en-GB: View associated pages on [Mercia's Quill]({{reward_mq_url#}}), the [Sea of Thieves Wiki]({{reward_wiki_url#}}), and [Geekya]({{reward_geekya_url#}})

meta.Community_Weekend_Campaign_Name.es-ES: Fin de Semana de la Comunidad de la Temporada {{season_number}}
meta.Community_Weekend_Campaign_Name.pt-BR: Fim de Semana da Comunidade da Temporada {{season_number}}

rewards.75000_Gold_Description.en-GB: A fair-sized heap of shiny golden coins that can you can spend any cosmetic items at outpost stores.

rewards.Placeholder_Description.en-GB: No description is currently available. This value will be updated in the future.

rewards.Plunder_Pass_Description.en-GB: Unlock extra rewards with this Season's Plunder Pass, offering previously unreleased cosmetics plus bonus currency including Ancient Coins to subsidise your purchase!

rewards.Seasonal_Renown_Bonus_Descriptio.en-GB: A boost of seasonal renown that can be used to level up your plunder pass for the season.

rewards.The_Gilded_Phoenix_Ship_Set_Desc.en-GB: A collection of lustrous items including the Gilded Phoenix Cannons, Capstan, Figurehead, Flag, Hull, Soaring Sails, and Wheel.

rewards.The_Gilded_Phoenix_Weapon_Set_De.en-GB: A collection of deadly items including the Gilded Phoenix Blunderbuss, Cutlass, Eye of Reach, and Pistol.

rewards.The_Obsidian_Six_Pack_Descriptio.en-GB: A collection of assorted items including the Obsidian Drum, Eye of Reach, Lantern, Pocket Watch, Speaking Trumpet, and Spyglass.

rewards.Voyage_Of_Luck_Description.en-GB: A limited-time voyage offering a chance at lucrative rewards sure to impress any pirate daring enough to embark on it.

short.Official_Twitch_Drop_Host.pt-BR: o Canal Oficial do Sea of Thieves

short.Partner_Twitch_Drop_Host.fr: n'importe quel partenaire Sea of Thieves
short.Partner_Twitch_Drop_Host.ko: 참여 중인 씨 오브 시브즈 파트너
short.Partner_Twitch_Drop_Host.pt-BR: qualquer Parceiro do Sea of Thieves
